name: ESG Inc.
summary: DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Company Overview We were incorporated under the name Plasma Innovative Inc. on July 22, 2021 an emerging cold plasma application company. We intended to use our proprietary, cold plasma technology to treat crops and plant seeds for agriculture. However, we have decided that it is in the best interest of our shareholders to cease operations in the plasma application in the agriculture sector.
